findings.evidence: `rg -n "fixedOnSubgroup_(empty|union|iUnion|antitone)" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Relative.lean` has no hits; Mathlib provides `fixingSubgroup_empty`, `fixingSubgroup_antitone`, `fixingSubgroup_union`, and `fixingSubgroup_iUnion` at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/FixingSubgroup.lean:140,144,153,159`.
findings.fix: Add named lemmas such as `fixedOnSubgroup_empty`, `fixedOnSubgroup_union`, `fixedOnSubgroup_iUnion`, and `fixedOnSubgroup_antitone`, with the empty normal form marked `@[simp]` as in Mathlib.
findings.issue: `fixedOnSubgroup` lacks wrapper-level set-operation API, so users cannot rewrite empty sets, unions, iUnions, or use antitonicity through the new public name.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "fixedOnSubgroup_fixedPoints|fixedPoints_.*fixedOnSubgroup|fixedPoints_subgroup" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Relative.lean` has no hits; Mathlib’s characteristic API is `fixingSubgroup_fixedPoints_gc` at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/FixingSubgroup.lean:134` with fixed-points consequences at lines 165 and 171.
findings.fix: Expose the Galois connection/fixed-points consequences specialized to diffeomorphisms, e.g. `fixedOnSubgroup_fixedPoints_gc` and the corresponding `fixedPoints_subgroup_sup`/`iSup` wrappers where useful.
findings.issue: `fixedOnSubgroup` omits the fixed-points universal property for the fixing subgroup, forcing downstream users back to the generic `_root_.fixingSubgroup` API to characterize the new subgroup.

summary: The new subgroup names expose only membership and forgetful lemmas, leaving the characteristic fixing-subgroup API unavailable under the diffeomorphism-facing interface.
